title: haplopappus elatus
intro: Haplopappus elatus, also known as the Rocky Mountain goldenweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Haplopappus elatus include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help fight off infections. Haplopappus elatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and interactions.
